reviews.comment:
Posee buenos servicios

(Translated by Google)
It has good services
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBa3JPeGxBRRAB

reviews.comment:
La estación está en muy buen estado. La atención es buena y el bar es muy completo. Está ubicada en un lugar estratégico para la recarga de combustible y para parar a descansar o dormir.

(Translated by Google)
The station is in very good condition. The service is good and the bar is well-stocked. It's strategically located for refueling and for stopping to rest or sleep.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su calificación y comentario

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURncE1IZm53RRAB

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Clean restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURneUp2M1V3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención del personal. Pésima. Hasta te toman el pelo

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service from the staff. Terrible. They even make fun of you.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3a0t1NC1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
En playa los vendedores poca actitud de servicio.No funciona poste de inflado. En tienda precios caros por sándwiches ordinarios. Los precios exhibidos difieren de lo cobrado. Baños ok.

(Translated by Google)
On the beach, the vendors have poor customer service skills. The air pumps aren't working. In the store, the prices are high for ordinary sandwiches. The displayed prices differ from what they charge. The restrooms are okay.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRNDlqRjJBRRAB
